steps: Go to https://app.copper.com and sign in to your Copper account
Click the gear icon or navigate to 'Settings' in the left navigation
Go to 'Integrations' > 'API Keys' (or directly visit https://app.copper.com/settings/api-keys)
Enter a label for the key to identify its purpose
Note: every request also requires the email address of the user who generated the key in the X-PW-UserEmail header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Access Token)
credential_fields.description: Your Copper API access token, sent as the X-PW-AccessToken header

credential_fields.name: user_email
credential_fields.label: User Email
credential_fields.description: The email address of the Copper user who generated the API key. Required on every request as the X-PW-UserEmail header.

notes: Every API request requires both X-PW-AccessToken and X-PW-UserEmail headers
Also required: X-PW-Application: developer_api and Content-Type: application/json on all requests
Users can hold multiple valid tokens simultaneously
Admins can view and manage all user-generated tokens
No free tier — Copper requires a paid subscription

test_endpoint.description: Fetch account details for the authenticated user. Note: this endpoint uses POST method.
